{{Quote|The real ''Slave One'' is within the Coruscant system, at the orbit of the outermost planet. We will rendezvous with her and get you to a place of safety.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], to [[Natasi Daala]]|<ref name="Conviction">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]''</ref>}}
'''Ulabos''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]], rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]].<ref name="CatCW" /> It was surrounded by immense [[Planetary ring/Legends|rings]] of [[Water/Legends|ice]] and rock,<ref name="CSWE-Ulabos">{{CSWECite|III|278|Ulabos}}</ref> known as the [[Ulabos ice bands]].<ref name="SbS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
